prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.8 kg; Height 152.9 cm; BMI 20.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.6%), FPG (12 months ago 260mg/dL; 9 months ago 244mg/dL; 6 months ago 229mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 262mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 47.2kg; 9 months ago 45.9kg; 6 months ago 46.9kg; 3 months ago 47.9kg; current 46.8kg), Height (12 months ago 152.9cm; 9 months ago 152.9cm; 6 months ago 152.9cm; 3 months ago 152.9cm; current 152.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.2mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 314mg/g; 9 months ago 273mg/g; 6 months ago 409mg/g; 3 months ago 436mg/g; current 371mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.13 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
